name: Florentines
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Whipping cream; plus 1 tbsp Whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Stir in flour alternately with cream, then mix in almonds.
4. Drop teaspoons of batter 3-inches apart on greased and floured baking sheets.
5. With a knife dipped in cold water, spread the batter into 2-inch rounds.
6. Bake for 12 minutes.
7. Cool 1-2 minutes on baking sheets, then transfer to wire racks.
8. If cookies become hard to remove, return to the oven for 1-2 minutes to soften.
9. Melt chocolate with butter and cool slightly.
10. Spread over bottoms of cookies.
